✦ Our Story

Crafting Beauty Since Day One

Manushi Beauty Parlour & Academy is Siwan's premier destination for beauty, wellness, and professional training. Run by Manisha Kumari, we are dedicated exclusively to women — offering a safe, luxurious, and empowering space.

From celebrity-style bridal makeup to precision hair treatments and advanced skincare — our expert team combines technique with artistry to deliver results that truly wow.

We are also a certified training academy, nurturing the next generation of beauty professionals through our structured beautician courses.

500+
Happy Brides
15+
Services
100%
Women Only
